mapper.select: /* StatsMgmtMapper.getCstmrChk */ SELECT A.PROC_YN ,A.SUCC_YN ,CASE WHEN A.CHG_TYPE = 'I' THEN B.CONTRACT_NUM ELSE (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{ncn}) END CONTRACT_NUM ,B.EVENT_CODE ,B.T_SOC_CODE ,TO_CHAR(B.SYS_RDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SYS_RDATE FROM MSP_SOCFAIL_PROC_MST A ,MCP_SERVICE_ALTER_TRACE@DL_MCP B WHERE A.PRCS_MDL_IND = #{prcsMdlInd} AND A.PRCS_MDL_IND = B.PRCS_MDL_IND AND B.NCN = #{ncn} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SEQ = #{seq} AND B.SYS_DT = #{sysDt}

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getCstmrPrmtId */ SELECT PRMT_ID, DIS_PRMT_ID FROM (SELECT A.PRMT_ID , B.DIS_PRMT_ID FROM MSP_DIS_APD A, MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY A.APD_SEQ DESC) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT ('RTY' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_RTY.NEXTVAL, '000000'))) AS PRC_RTY_SEQ FROM DUAL
